  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet wiꞥſch irr muhſu
Bahrkahpfchannu deht eewai-
nohts/ un muhſu Aprwainofcha-
nu deht fagraunſts. Ta Sohdiba
gull us winnu/zaur ko mums
Meers nahk/ un zaur winna
Bruhzahm effam mehs dscedi-
nati.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehs maldijam wiſi ka
Awis/ mehs raudſijam ikkatrs
us ſawu Zettu/ bet tas KUNGS
likfe wiſus muhſus Grehkus
winnam useet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "(Tas Grehku.Parads)
tappe praſſihts/ un wiꞥſch tap-
pe apbehdihahts/ un ne atdarri-
ja ſawu Mutti/ itt ka Jehrs/ kas
pee Rauschanas wests tohp/ un
ka Aws/ kas kluſu paleek preeſſch
fawa Zirpeja/ ta patt wiꞥſch ne
atdarrija ſawu Mutti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch irr no tahs Bat-
litas un Sohdibas iſrauts/ kas
tad iſſkaitihs winna Muhſchu ?
bad wiꞥſch no tahs Semmes to
Dsihu nogreests tappis/ tappe
wiꞥſch mohzihſs mannu Lauschu
Pahrkahpfchanas deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un * wiꞥſch irr to Beṣ-
deewibu ſawā Kappa lizzis/ un
to Baggatibu eeſſch ſawas Mir-
chanas/ tapehz ka wiꞥſch netaif-
nt ne bij darrijs/ neds Wiltiba
vianna Mutte irr bijuſi.
* Eebr: Wall: ir ta : Wiach irr tohs Bes-
leewigns, (to Paganu Kara Laudis) pee win-
a Kappa lizzis, un to bagga tu Jahlepu no Ari-
natijas pee ſawas Mirfchanas, ka tas winna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS grib-
beja winnu fagraust ar Wahji-
bahm. Kad wiꞥſch farvn Dweh-
teli par Noseedsibas-Uppuri de-
wis irr/ tad redſehs wiꞥſch Dsun-
mumu/ un dſihwohs ilgi/ un ta
KUNGA Prahtslabbi isdohtees
zaur winna Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ka winna Dweh-
fele gruhti irr strahdajſi/ wiꞥſch
redſehs (Preeku) un papillam.
Zaur ſawu Atsihſchanu darrihs
mans Kalps tas Taſfnajs dauds
Taſtnus/ jo wiꞥſch neſſihs win-
nu Noseeguinus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz dohſchu es wiꞥ-
xam leelu Pulku par Dakku/ un
Wiꞥſch dallihs tohs Warrenus
ka Lauptjumu/ tapehz ka wiꞥſch
lihds patt Nahwei irr paſemmo-
jees/ un ſtarp teem Pahrkahpa-
jeem irr lihdsinahts tappis; un
dauds Grehkus nehſs / un
preeſſch teem Pahrkahpajeem
luhdsis irr.
"
    }
  ],
